anomalies.t: DOMINANT & ONLY recurring failure mode: both of today's 2 failures are this class. Contribution Check 26784313244 (add_comment target=* no item_number on schedule -> Message 3 failed -> whole job red despite create_issue + add_labels OK — RECURRENCE on this same workflow, also 05-30); Smoke Claude 26784371743 (2x create_pull_request_review_comment target=* no pull_request_number -> Messages 8,9 failed -> whole job red despite other outputs OK — NEW workflow). Class now spans 6 workflows since 05-26. Root defect unchanged: Process Safe Outputs red-fails the whole job on ANY failed item instead of skip-with-warning when >=1 succeeded. Needs partial-failure tolerance + emit-time target=* validation.
